ref: 七名船员弃船到波涛汹涌的大海上，到岛上寻求避难。

src: Nine months after announcing the interoperability between their instant messaging (IM) services, Internet rivals Microsoft and Yahoo! began limited public beta (pre-release) testing of the program.
ref: 在宣布即时通讯（IM）服务互操作性九个月后，互联网竞争对手微软和雅虎开始对程序进行有限的公测（预发布）。

src: This enables users of the two services to communicate with each other using their existing IM client, Microsoft's Windows Live Messenger (formerly MSN Messenger) and Yahoo! Messenger with Voice.
ref: 这使得这两种服务的用户可以使用他们现有的即时通讯客户端，即微软的Windows Live Messenger（前身为MSN Messenger）和雅虎的语音通讯彼此通信。

src: Users wishing to use the new feature can go to a special page on the service's website, where they have to review and accept an agreement.
ref: 希望使用这项新功能的用户可以进入该服务网站的一个特殊页面，在那里他们必须审查并接受协议。

src: After signing out and signing in again, the interoperability is enabled without downloading any new software.
ref: 退出并再次登录后，互操作性就启用了，无需下载任何新软件。

src: The service is designed to allow users to see each others' online presence, view personal status messages, share select emoticons, view offline messages and add new contacts from either service.
ref: 该服务旨在让用户可以看到彼此的在线状态、查看个人状态信息、分享选择的表情符号、查看离线消息，并从这两项服务中添加新的联系人。

src: However, more advanced features, like voice calls and shared folders are not interoperable between the two services.
ref: 但是，如语音呼叫和共享文件夹等更高级的功能，在两种服务之间无法互操作。

src: The program is available internationally in more than 15 markets.
ref: 该计划在全球超过15个市场上销售。

src: Insurgents in eastern Afghanistan fired rockets into a marketplace on Monday, killing ten civilians in an area where French armed forces were meeting with tribal elders.
ref: 阿富汗东部的叛乱分子星期一向市场发射火箭，在法国武装部队与部落长老会面的地区杀死了10名平民。

src: French and Afghan officials said the attack, which was in the town of Tagab in the Kapisa province, wounded at least 28 people.
ref: 法国和阿富汗官员说，袭击发生在卡比萨省塔加布镇，造成至少28人受伤。

src: Two rockets hit the market as the commander of French troops in eastern Afghanistan, General Marcel Druart, was meeting tribal chiefs nearby.
ref: 两枚火箭弹击中市场，当时驻阿富汗东部的法国军队指挥官马塞尔·德鲁阿特将军正在附近会见部落首领。

src: "The Taliban fired the rockets from Badrab, where they have a base."
ref: “塔利班从巴德拉布发射火箭，他们在那里有一个基地。”

src: "They are strong there," said deputy police chief Haji Mohammed Akbar.
ref: “他们在那里很强大，”副警察局长哈吉·穆罕默德·阿克巴说。

src: French and US medical teams evacuated the wounded by helicopter to hospitals for treatment.
ref: 法国和美国医疗队通过直升机将伤员撤离到医院接受治疗。

src: The French commander attended the gathering of tribal elders, known as a "shura," as part of NATO efforts to win the trust of Afghan civilians in a region with a strong Taliban presence.
ref: 法国指挥官参加了被称为“舒拉”的部落长老集会，这是北约在塔利班势力强大的地区赢得阿富汗平民信任的努力的一部分。

src: French troops have been fighting the Taliban northeast of the capital, Kabul, to try to secure towns and roads threatened by the militants.
ref: 法国军队一直在与首都喀布尔东北部的塔利班作战，试图确保受武装分子威胁的城镇和道路。

src: Ric Flair (real name Richard Fliehr) has a warrant out for his arrest.
ref: 已发出对里克·沃尔特（真名理查德·弗莱尔）的逮捕令。

src: According to an ABC affiliate in Charlotte, North Carolina, Flair took part in an alleged road rage incident last Wednesday on Interstate 485.
ref: 据美国广播公司在北卡罗来纳州夏洛特的一家分支机构报道，弗莱尔上周三在485号州际公路上参与了一起涉嫌的公路暴乱事件。

src: Allegedly Flair got out of his car and assaulted the man in front of him.
ref: 据说弗莱尔下了车，袭击了他前面的人。

src: One warrant for assault on someone's property and a second for assault on another person.
ref: 一份逮捕令是对别人财产的侵犯，另一份逮捕令是对另一个人的侵犯。

src: The U.S. Senate has adopted an amendment, proposed by Senator Lindsey Graham (R-SC), to a defense bill limiting detainees' court privileges.
ref: 美国参议院通过了参议员林赛·格雷厄姆（R-SC）提出的一项修正案，该修正案旨在限制被拘留者的法庭特权。

src: The amendment would make the Combat Status Review Tribunal (CSRT) statutory law, the Annual Review Board (ARB) statutory law, require the designated civilian officer to be a government official who is appointed by the President with the advice and consent of the Senate, not allow the preponderance of evidence against a detainee be derived from undue coercion, and remove Guantanamo prisoners' right to file habeas corpus petitions in federal courts.
ref: 该修正案将使《战斗状态审查法庭（CSRT）法定法》、《年度审查委员会（ARB）法定法》要求指定文职官员为政府官员，由总统在参议院的建议和同意下任命，不允许对被拘留者的主要证据来自不正当的胁迫，并剥夺关塔那摩囚犯向联邦法院提交人身保护令申请的权利。

src: In regards to the habeas corpus provision, the amendment specifically states, "No court, justice, or judge shall have jurisdiction to hear or consider an application for a writ of habeas corpus filed by or on behalf of an alien outside the United States (as that term is defined in section 101(a)(38) of the Immigration and Naturalization Act (8 U.S.C. 1101(a)(38)) who is detained by the Department of Defense at Guantanamo Bay, Cuba."
ref: 关于人身保护令的规定，修正案明确规定：任何法院、审判官或法官均无权审理或考虑由被美国国防部拘留在古巴关塔那摩湾的美国境外外国人或其代理人提交的人身保护令申请（（该条款在《移民和归化法》8 U.S.C.1101（a）（38）中的第101（a）（38）条对此有相关规定）。

src: Five Democrats jumped party lines to vote for and four Republicans jumped party lines to vote against the amendment.
ref: 五名民主党人打破党派界限投票赞成，四名共和党人打破党派界限投票反对修正案。

src: Nine Senators, seven Republicans and two Democrats, did not vote on the amendment.
ref: 九名参议员，七名共和党人和两名民主党人没有对修正案进行投票。

src: Kent Conrad, Mary Landrieu, Joseph Lieberman, Ben Nelson, and Ron Wyden were the Democrats who voted for the amendment.
ref: 肯特·康拉德、玛丽·兰德里欧、约瑟夫·利伯曼、本·尼尔森和罗恩·怀登是投修正案赞成票的民主党人。

src: Arlen Specter, Lincoln Chafee, Gordon Smith, and John Sununu were the Republicans who voted against the measure.
ref: 阿伦·斯佩克特，林肯·查菲，戈登·史密斯和约翰·苏努努是投票反对这项措施的共和党人。

src: Senator Graham is quoted as saying, "The president has established procedures to determine who is an enemy combatant and to annually review their status."
ref: 援引参议员格雷厄姆的话说，“总统已经建立了程序，以确定谁是敌方战斗人员，并每年审查他们的状态。”

src: "It’s now time for Congress to sign-off on these procedures and turn them into a statute, a move the courts will give great deference to."
ref: “现在是国会签署这些程序并将其转化为法律的时候了，法院将给予极大的尊重。”

src: It should be noted that under Graham's amendment, detainees would be able to challenge only the narrow question of whether the procedures established by the Secretary of Defense at the time the military determined their status as an enemy combatant were followed.
ref: 应该指出的是，根据格雷厄姆的修正案，被拘留者将只能对一个狭隘的问题提出质疑，即军方确定他们作为敌方战斗人员的地位时，国防部长所制定的程序是否得到遵守。

src: The Court of Appeals for the DC circuit would still retain the ability to rule on that question.
ref: DC巡回上诉法院仍然有能力对该问题作出裁决。

src: Civil liberties groups as well as human rights groups issued statements opposing the amendment.
ref: 公民自由组织和人权组织发表声明反对这项修正案。

src: "The Graham amendment will create a thousand points of darkness across the globe where the United States will be free to hold people indefinitely without a hearing and beyond the reach of U.S. law and the checks and balances of the courts enshrined in our Constitution," the Center for Constitutional Rights said in a statement.
ref: 宪法权利中心在一份声明中说：“格雷厄姆修正案将在全球范围内造成一千个黑暗点，美国将在没有听证会的情况下，在美国法律及宪法中规定的法院的制衡范围之外，自由地无限期地关押人民。”

src: "The Graham amendment would strip all courts, including the Supreme Court, of jurisdiction to consider habeas corpus petitions or any other action challenging any aspect of the detention of foreign detainees held at Guantanamo Bay, except for the narrow question of whether status review boards follow their own rules," said a press release from the American Civil Liberties Union.
ref: “格雷厄姆修正案将剥夺包括最高法院在内的所有有管辖权的法院审议人身保护令请愿书或任何其他对关塔那摩湾外国被拘留者的任何方面提出质疑的诉讼，但关于地位审查委员会是否遵守其自身规则的狭隘问题除外”，美国公民自由联盟在一份新闻稿中说。

src: In a last minute change of position, the National Transitional Government of Liberia (NTGL) has reversed its decision not to allow the Liberian National football team, The Lone Star, to attend Sunday's World Cup qualifier against Togo.
ref: 利比里亚全国过渡政府（NTGL）在最后时刻改变了立场，改变了不允许利比里亚国家足球队孤星参加周日对多哥的世界杯预选赛的决定。

src: The NTGL had announced on Wednesday that the squad would not be able to travel to Lome, Togo because of a lack of funds to pay for the team's travel.
ref: NTGL在周三宣布球队将无法前往多哥的洛美，因为球队没有足够的资金来支付球队的旅费。

src: In a statement explaining its decision not to fund the team's travel, the NTGL highlighted more pressing financial obligations such as the country's upcoming national elections and the demobilization of the nation's defunct armed forces.
ref: NTGL在一份声明中解释了其不资助该团队旅行的决定，强调了更为紧迫的财政义务，如该国即将举行的全国选举和该国退役武装部队的复员。

src: "As a result of the huge expenditure, the National Transitional Government of Liberia has decided it is unfeasible to underwrite the Lone Star's travel to Togo," said the Minister of Information, Dr. C. William Allen.
ref: “由于巨额支出，利比里亚全国过渡政府决定，承担孤星前往多哥的旅行费用是不可行的，”新闻部长c·威廉·艾伦博士说。

src: The decision to allow The Lone Star to travel to Lome was made after the price of the team's travel decreased from US$31,000 to US$18,000.
ref: 允许孤星前往洛美的决定是在该团队的旅费从3.1万美元降至1.8万美元之后做出的。

src: The team now plans to fly to Accra and take a bus to Lome versus fly the entire way.
ref: 该团队现在计划飞往阿克拉，乘坐公共汽车前往洛美而不是全程飞行。

src: Had Liberia failed to take the field on Sunday, the country would have faced fines of US$31,895 and possible prohibition from participating in the 2010 World Cup to be held in South Africa.
ref: 如果利比里亚在周日没有参加比赛，该国将面临31,895美元的罚款，并可能禁止参加将在南非举行的2010年世界杯。

src: Incidentally, the fines would have been slightly more than the team's original travel budget.
ref: 顺便说一句，罚款将略高于团队的原始旅行预算。

src: Classified memos have revealed that the Bush administration knowingly endorsed enhanced interrogation techniques including waterboarding and other methods, that critics call torture, for use against terror suspects.
ref: 机密备忘录显示，布什政府有意支持加强审讯技术，包括水刑和一些其他被批评者称为酷刑的方法，用于打击恐怖嫌犯。

src: The memos were issued to the CIA in 2003 and 2004 as classified documents in response to the department's former director George Tenet's request for White House approval.
ref: 这些备忘录是在2003年和2004年作为机密文件发给中央情报局的，以回应该部门前任局长乔治·特尼特向白宫申请批准的请求。

src: "The CIA believed then, and now, that the program was useful and helped save lives," commented a former CIA official, explaining the memos.
ref: “中情局当时和现在都相信，该计划非常有用并有助于拯救生命，”一位前中央情报局官员在解释这些备忘录时这样评论。

src: "But in the agency's view, it was like this:"
ref: “但在该机构看来，就像这样：”。

src: We don't want to continue unless you tell us in writing that it's not only legal but is the policy of the administration'.
ref: 我们不想继续，除非你以书面形式告诉我们这不仅是合法的，而且是政府的政策。

src: In private meetings led by then-National Security Adviser Condoleezza Rice, top administration officials Vice President Cheney, Attorney General Ashcroft and several former members of the administration discussed the endorsement of the programs.
ref: 在当时的国家安全顾问康多莉扎·赖斯领导的非公开会议上，高级政府官员副总统切尼，总检察长阿什克罗夫特和几位前政府成员讨论了对这些计划的认可。

src: No one at the meetings had questioned the methods because the CIA had them "boxed in", a former official noted.
ref: 一位前官员指出，会议中没有人质疑这些方法，因为中情局将它们“封箱”了。

src: "They were saying, 'It's the only way to get the information we needed, and — by the way — we think there's another attack coming up'."
ref: “他们说，‘这是获取我们所需信息的唯一途径，而且，顺便说一下，我们认为还会有另一次攻击’。”

src: Another official, however, called the idea that the CIA had coerced the Bush administration into approving the torture methods "ridiculous".
ref: 然而，另一位官员称中央情报局意图强迫布什政府批准酷刑方法的想法是“荒谬”的。

src: The CIA, he said, understood the methods were "controversial and would be widely criticized if it became public".
ref: 他说，中情局了解这些方法是“有争议的，如果被公开就会受到广泛的批评”。

src: Tenet said that in a 2001 meeting with top administration officials, Rice had warned those attending of an impending attack by a top Al-Qaeda suspect, Abu Zubaydah.
ref: 特尼特说，在2001年与高级政府官员的会晤中，赖斯警告与会人员，基地组织头号嫌疑人阿布祖巴达即将发动攻击。

src: Bush had asked a CIA staffer if the methods really worked.
ref: 布什曾询问过中情局的一名工作人员，这些方法是否真的有效。

src: Ashcroft had commented during the meetings that "history will not judge us kindly".
ref: 阿什克罗夫特在会议期间评论说“历史不会友善地评判我们”。

src: Last month, Rice stated that there was concern over the legality of the program and that she was investigating if any laws had been broken.
ref: 上个月，赖斯表示对该计划的合法性感到担忧，并且她正在调查该计划是否违反了某一项法律。

src: On CNN's Anderson Cooper-hosted 360 Degrees program, former British Prime Minister John Major said, "I think it's now patently apparent that there are people in the United Kingdom (who) are alienated from the Anglo-Saxon way of life and are prepared to indulge in these dreadful acts of criminality."
ref: 在美国有线电视新闻网由安德森·库珀主持的“360度”节目中，前英国首相约翰·梅杰说：“我认为现在英国明显有很多人远离了盎格鲁-撒克逊式的生活方式，开始沉溺于这种可怕的犯罪行为中。”

src: Ekow Eshun of the Newstatesman writes that Major's comments belong on the dustheap of history along with cricket.
ref: 《新政治家周刊》的艾可·厄舜在文章中写道，梅杰的观点应该跟板球一起放入历史的垃圾堆中。

src: The former British leader has also been recently quoted as saying in reference to the Brazilian citizen killed by police; "I rather prefer the expression shoot to protect rather than shoot to kill — I think that is a more accurate description of what happened."
ref: 最近也有人引用英国前任领导人关于被警察杀害的巴西公民的言论：“我更喜欢开枪来保护这种说法，而不喜欢开枪来射杀这样的说法-我认为这是对所发生的事件更准确的描述。”

src: In addition Sir John has come out as an advocate of deportation for people who express distaste for the "Anglo-Saxon way of life".
ref: 另外，约翰首相主张将讨厌“盎格鲁·撒克逊式的生活方式”的人驱逐出境。

src: The Saudi ambassador to London, Prince Turki al-Faisal, is voicing the same position as Major regarding the need for deporting some of the Muslim clerics.
ref: 关于驱逐一部分穆斯林牧师的必要性，沙特驻伦敦大使图尔基·费萨尔亲王与梅杰持相同观点。

src: In the 1960s there was born a somewhat similar "America, love it or leave it" viewpoint among American conservatives, a viewpoint that is still the subject of debate today.
ref: 20世纪60年代，美国保守派中出现了与“美国，要么爱它，要么离开它”相类似的观点，这个观点现在仍然是争论的主题。

src: A rupture in the underground stormwater drain system opened a huge sinkhole on February 23, killing three people and bringing down twelve houses in Guatemala City.
ref: 2月23日，危地马拉城地下雨水排放系统破裂形成了一个巨大的天坑，造成3人死亡，12座房屋倒塌。

src: Teenagers Irma and David Soyos and their father, 53-year old Domingo Soyos were killed when their house collapsed into the sinkhole.
ref: 青年埃尔玛和大卫·索约斯以及他们的父亲，53岁的多明戈·索约斯在他们的房子倒塌进天坑后遇难。

src: Nearly a thousand people were evacuated from the San Antonio neighborhood after the collapse.
ref: 房屋倒塌后，近一千人从圣安东尼奥附近撤离。

src: Wikinews interviewed Eric Haddox, a civil engineer who has visited the site of the sinkhole and spoken to the engineers working on fixing the drain.
ref: 维基新闻采访了埃里克·哈多克斯，他是一名土木工程师，他前往天坑所在地，并与负责修复排水沟的工程师进行了讨论。

src: Mr. Haddox, who specialises in the building of earthworks, roads, water supply and sewage systems, and is working as a missionary in Guatemala, visited the site following the collapse to help in the recovery effort.
ref: 哈多克斯先生专门从事土方工程、道路、供水和污水系统的建设。目前他在危地马拉担任传教士，在房屋倒塌后他前往了该地以帮助恢复工作。

src: Mr. Haddox told us that the size of the hole is much smaller than the 330 feet depth originally reported and that the erosion causing the collapse is believed to have happened over a long time, and not just during the recent rains as initially suspected.
ref: 哈多克斯告诉我们，这个洞的大小比最初报道的330英尺深的洞要小得多，据信导致房屋坍塌的侵蚀已经发生了很长时间，而且并不像最初怀疑的那样，只是在最近的降雨期间才发生侵蚀。

src: There are also concerns that a four-story building less than a metre from the edge of the hole may collapse as the earth under the building continues to be eroded.
ref: 还有人担心，距离洞口边缘不到一米的四层建筑可能会随着建筑物下方的土壤继续侵蚀而倒塌。

src: Scientists at the Ohio University predicted that the ice sheets of Mount Kilimanjaro, Africa's tallest mountain peak, will melt in the next twenty years due to global warming.
ref: 俄亥俄大学的科学家们预测，未来20年非洲最高的乞力马扎罗山上的冰层将会因全球变暖而融化。

src: The ice that was present in 1912 gradually decreased by 85% by 2000, and by 2007 another 26% of the amount in 2000.
ref: 1912年凝结的冰到2000年逐渐减少了百分之85，到2007年又减少了百分之26。

src: This was the first time that the volume of the ice in Kilimanjaro was measured.
ref: 这是第一次测量乞力马扎罗山的冰体积。

src: The tests were conducted by Lonnie Thompson, a professor at Ohio University.
ref: 测量工作由俄亥俄大学的教授朗尼·汤普森进行。

src: "The fact that so many glaciers throughout the tropics and subtropics are showing similar responses suggests an underlying common cause," Thompson said.
ref: 汤普森谈到：“遍布热带和亚热带地区的冰川，同样也在减少，这一事实说明了一个潜在的共同原因。”

src: Change in cloudiness and weather could have also been factors in the retreat of the ice, especially in recent decades, scientists said.
ref: 科学家们说，特别是近几十年来，云层和天气的变化也会是导致冰融化的因素。

src: These findings were first published in the journal proceedings of United States National Academy of Sciences (NAS) on Monday.
ref: 这些发现于周一首次发表在了美国国家科学院院刊之上。

src: President George W. Bush ordered Jose Padilla, detained by the US Military as an alleged terrorist, to be transferred out of military custody in order to face trial in a federal criminal court.
ref: 布什总统下令将被美国军方拘留的恐怖分子约瑟•帕迪利亚从军事羁押中转移出去，到联邦刑事法院接受审判。

src: He is charged with conspiracy to commit murder, kidnapping, aiding terrorist groups and other acts against US nationals outside the United States.
ref: 他被控参与谋杀、绑架、协助恐怖组织和其他一些针对美国境外美国公民的行为。

src: These actions come six days ahead of a decision by the US Supreme Court on whether it should review the 4th U.S. Circuit Court of Appeal's ruling that the president is authorised to hold Padilla as an "Enemy Combatant" without charge.
ref: 事情发生的六天后，美国最高法院就是否审查第四巡回法院的上诉裁决，关于授权总统不经指控就将帕迪利亚视为“敌人的战士”作出决定。

src: Jose Padilla, a US citizen born in Brooklyn, has been held without charge in a military brig at a US Navy detention facility in South Carolina for the three-and-a-half years since his arrest in 2002.
ref: 出生于布鲁克林的美国公民约瑟•帕迪利亚，自2002年被捕以来，他未经指控在南卡罗来纳州的一个美国海军拘留所的军事监狱里，被关押了三年半。

src: The administration had at the time alleged that Padilla was plotting to detonate a Radioactive "dirty" bomb in the US and later, Deputy Attorney General James Comey alleged that he was involved in plots to blow up Hotels and high-rise buildings .
ref: 当局政府声称帕迪利亚正密谋在美国引爆一枚放射性“邪恶”炸弹，后来，副检察长詹姆斯·科米承认他参与了炸毁酒店和高层建筑的阴谋。

src: The present indictment does not include any charges over these allegations.
ref: 目前起诉书中不含对这些陈词的任何指控。

src: Instead, Padilla is charged with travelling abroad to train in "violent Jihad", providing material support to terrorists by sending money, physical assets, and new recruits to Jihadi groups, and conspiring to murder individuals overseas .
ref: 而是，指控帕迪拉出国参与“暴力圣战”训练，向恐怖分子提供物质支持，向圣战组织派遣金钱、实物资产和新兵，并在海外密谋杀人。

src: The change in custody restores to Padilla a number of rights he had been denied when the administration designated him as an "Enemy Combatant", including the right to access federal courts and be defended by an attorney.
ref: 拘留权的改变使帕迪利亚恢复了一些权利，当政府认定他为“敌方战斗员”时，他被剥夺了这些权利，包括进入联邦法院并由律师辩护的权利。

src: That constitutionality of detaining suspects without charge under this designation has been challenged in court, on behalf of Padilla and in September, a 3-judge panel of the 4th US Circuit Court of Appeals upheld the government's powers to detain Padilla.
ref: 代表帕迪利亚的法庭对未经指控扣押嫌犯的行为提出了质疑，9月，美国第四巡回上诉法院的一个三法官小组认同了政府拘留帕迪拉的权力。

src: The Supreme Court was set to decide on whether it will review that decision next week.
ref: 最高法院定于下周决定是否重新审议这一裁定。

src: Padilla's status, for the purpose of this trial, is that of an ordinary criminal indictee, possessing the legal rights conferred on him by the US Bill of Rights.
ref: 就本次审判而言，帕迪利亚的身份是普通刑事起诉人，拥有美国《权利法案》赋予他的合法权利。

src: Democratic Party of Japan (DPJ) could claim victory in Sunday's House of Councillors elections.
ref: 日本民主党（DPJ）可能会在周日的众议院选举中获胜。

src: The House of Councillors is the upper house in the bicameral National Diet of Japan.
ref: 参议院是两院制日本国会的上院。

src: Of the 242 seats, DPJ went from 82 to 109 seats, making it the largest party in the House of Councillors.
ref: 一共242个席位，而民主党从82个席位上升到109个席位，成为众议院最大的政党。

src: This gain came largely at the expense of the ruling Liberal Democratic Party (LDP), which went from 119 seats to 83.
ref: 这一增长主要是以自民党（LDP）执政为代价，自民党从119个席位下降到83个席位。

src: Also losing seats was LDP's coalition partner, New Komeito Party (NKP), which lost 4 councillor seats and now holds 20.
ref: 同样失去席位的还有自民党的联盟伙伴，新公明党（NKP），它失去了4个议员席位，现在拥有20个席位。

src: Japan's Prime Minister Shinzo Abe said that while he takes the result of the election "very seriously," he does not intend to resign his post.
ref: 日本首相安倍晋三表示，他“非常认真”地看待选举结果，但他并不打算辞职。

src: "We must take these results very seriously and reflecting on what we must reflect on," Abe said at a news conference.
ref: 安倍晋三在新闻发布会上说：“我们必须非常认真地对待这些结果，并反思我们必须反思的事情”。

src: "I want to fulfill my responsibility to proceed with reform to build the nation and promote economic growth that the people can feel."
ref: “我要履行我的责任，进行改革，建设国家，促进人人都看得见的经济增长”。

src: The election result will not force the government out of power, since the LDP holds 296 of the 480 seats in the House of Representatives.
ref: 选举结果不会迫使政府下台，因为自民党在众议院480个席位中占有296个席位。

src: "Voters said we must reflect on our shortcomings and refresh the line-up," Abe said.
ref: 安倍晋三说：“选民们说，我们必须反思缺点，重新调整立场”。

src: "I plan to reshuffle the Cabinet and top party posts at an appropriate time."
ref: “我计划在适当的时候重新调整内阁和党内最高职位”。

src: He really needs to accept the results of the election and think about the future.
ref: 他真的需要接受所有选举结果，思考未来。

src: "This might include quitting," 38-year-old civil servant Akihiro Kodaira told Reuters.
ref: “这结果可能包括辞职”，38岁的公务员古平秋广告诉路透社。

src: The Large Hadron Collider (LHC) that started preliminary experiments on September 10, 2008 in CERN,Geneva, and the planned International Linear Collider (ILC) will carry out a series of experiments in the future to validate the standard model of particle physics.
ref: 于2008年9月10日在日内瓦欧洲核子研究中心（CERN）进行了初步实验的大型强子对撞机（LHC），以及计划的国际直线对撞机（ILC）未来将进行系列实验，以验证粒子物理的标准模型。

src: The model predicts that Higgs boson particles gives mass to all fundamental particles and explains the existence of dark matter, or invisible matter in between galaxies.
ref: 该模型预测了希格斯玻色粒子给所有基本粒子提供了质量，并解释了银河系中暗物质或不可见物质的存在。

src: The LHC is a 27 kilometer long circular high energy particle accelerator which took more than 20 years and USD $9 billion to build.
ref: 大型强子对撞机是一个27公里长的圆形高能粒子加速器，它花了20多年时间和90亿美元建造。

src: In the next few weeks the machine will collide opposing beams of protons charged with approximately 7 TeV of energy resulting in cataclysmic conditions that will mimic the beginning of time, a re-creation of the Big Bang.
ref: 在接下来的几周内，这台机器进行相反的质子束碰撞，这些质子束的能量大约为7太伏，从而形成爆炸条件，以此模拟世界开始时的大爆炸。

src: An upgraded version of the LHC was announced, nicknamed the "super LHC".
ref: 绰号为“超级大型强子对撞机”的LHC升级版的大型强子对撞机发布了。

src: The new accelerator will perform ten times the number of collisions as the current LHC over the same time.
ref: 新的加速器在同一时间内，可以执行十倍于大型强子对撞机的碰撞次数。

src: The upgrade will feature a new injection system and enhanced detectors to cope with the increase in data packets from collisions.
ref: 升级对撞机将采用新的注入系统和加强型检测器，以应对数据包因碰撞而增加的情况。

src: The bigger International Linear Collider, nicknamed "Einstein's telescope", is planned by the International Technology Recommendation Panel (ITRP).
ref: 国际技术推荐委员会（ITRP）计划推出更大的国际直线对撞机，绰号“爱因斯坦望远镜”。

src: The ILC will have a collision energy of 500 GeV and will collide electrons with particles of antimatter, called positrons, along a 30-40 km completely straight tunnel.
ref: 该对撞机的碰撞能量为500兆伏，并且会沿一个30-40公里的完全笔直的隧道，将电子与称为正电子的反物质粒子进行碰撞。

src: The ILC's two giant "guns" pointing at each other would be able to accelerate electrons and positrons to near-light speeds before smashing them together.
ref: 对撞机的两个巨大的“枪”互相指向对方，在电子和正电子碰撞之前，可以将它们加速到接近光速。

src: "The LHC smashes protons together to discover new particles but also generates lots of debris that obscures the fine detail."
ref: “大型强子对撞机将质子粉碎在一起，以此发现新的粒子，但同时也会产生大量的碎片，掩盖细微细节”。

src: "The ILC would be a much cleaner machine and tell us far more about their real nature."says Brian Foster, professor of experimental physics at Oxford University and European director of the project.
ref: 牛津大学实验物理教授，也是该项目的欧洲负责人布赖恩·福斯特说：“国际直线对撞机将是一台更清洁的机器，它能告诉我们更多关于粒子真实性质的信息”。

src: The host country for the ILC has not yet been chosen but it is planned to have the machine constructed by late 2010.
ref: 国际直线对撞机的东道国尚未选定，但计划在2010年年底前建造这台机器。

src: The new machine will cost an estimated USD $7 billion to build.
ref: 这台新机器的制造成本预计为70亿美元。

src: Physicists hope that ILC might be able to resolve some of the questions raised by Einstein's theories of relativity.
ref: 物理学家希望国际直线对撞机能够解决爱因斯坦在相对论中提出的一些问题。

src: The Church of England are planning to allow gay men who are celibate and in a civil partnership to become bishops according to an announcement made by the House of Bishops.
ref: 根据英国主教院的一项声明称，英国教会打算允许独身或民事伴侣关系的同性恋男子成为主教。

src: This expands a previous decision made in 2005 allowing gay clergy with civil partners.
ref: 这扩展了2005年的一项决定，即允许同性恋神职人员与民事伙伴共事。

src: Whether gay clergyman would be allowed to become bishops became an issue in 2003 with the appointment of Rev Jeffrey John as Bishop of Reading.
ref: 2003年，随着杰弗里·约翰牧师被任命为雷丁主教，同性恋牧师是否被允许成为主教成为的一个问题。

src: Jeffrey John was forced to step down from his position and now serves as Dean of St Albans Cathedral.
ref: 后来，杰弗里·约翰被迫辞职，现在担任圣奥尔本大教堂主持牧师。

src: In 2010, he was also a candidate to become Bishop of Southwark but was rejected, allegedly because of his sexual orientation.
ref: 2010年，他也曾是南华区主教的候选人，据称是因为他的性取向被否决了。

src: Anglican evangelicals have suggested such a change ought to have been passed by the General Synod rather than the House of Bishops.
ref: 英国圣公会的福音派认为，这种变化应该由总议会通过，而不是由主教院通过。

src: Chris Sugden from Anglican Mainstream said the change coming from the House of Bishops "looks too much like salami-slicing away at the Church's teaching".
ref: 来自英国圣公会主流的克里斯·苏格登说，来自主教院的变化“看起来太像教会教义中说的逐步去除”。

src: Former Bishop of Rochester Michael Nazir-Ali raised questions about what celibacy means for a gay bishop: "Does the admission of those in civil partnerships to the episcopate, who state they are celibate, include those who were previously in actively homophile relationships including with their present partner?"
ref: 罗切斯特市的前主教迈克尔·纳齐尔·阿里就同性恋主教独身标准提出疑问：“这包括那些以前有同性伴侣的独身主教，还是只包括现在有伴侣的情况”。

src: "The House of Bishops statement does not elaborate on this point but it is crucial to an understanding of what celibacy might mean in this context."
ref: “主教院的声明没有详细阐述这一点，但了解这种情况下的独身意味着什么是至关重要的”。

src: In November, the General Synod voted against proposals to allow the appointment of women as bishops.
ref: 11月，大会投票反对了任命女性为主教的提议。

src: The UN Security Council will "mostly likely" adopt a non-binding statement later today on North Korea's announcement of planned nuclear bomb tests; the statement does not explicitly mention the threat of sanctions.
ref: 联合国安理会将“非常可能”于今天晚些时候通过一项针对北朝鲜宣布核弹试验计划的非约束性声明；该声明没有明确提到以制裁的手段进行威慑。

src: This was announced by the Security Council president late yesterday.
ref: 这是安理会主席于昨日晚些时候宣布的。

src: Japan's UN envoy Kenzo Oshima, who chairs the 15-member body this month, said council experts made "good progress" in efforts to fine tune a Japanese draft, but said they had yet to finalize it.
ref: 日本的联合国特使大岛贤三是这个由15个成员国组成的团体的本月主席。他说，安理会的专家们在对日本草案进行微调方面取得了“良好的进展”，但是还需要把它最后确定下来。

src: "Most likely we will have something adopted (Friday)" once council members consult their respective capitals for "final clearance," he added.
ref: 他又说，一旦各成员国获得各自首都的“最后批准”，那么“我们很有可能（星期五）通过某种决议”。

src: Earlier on Thursday, Japan and the United States pushed for a threat to resort to mandatory sanctions under Chapter VII of the UN Charter.
ref: 星期四早些时候，日本和美国强烈要求根据“联合国宪章”第7章的规定采取强制性制裁手段进行威慑。

src: China and Russia (two veto members of the Council) however, voted against the sanctions.
ref: 然而，中国和俄罗斯（两个拥有否决权的安理会成员国）投票反对制裁。

src: It is hoped that the latest text will urge Pyongyang to abandon its nuclear tests and return back to six-party talks "without precondition".
ref: 希望最新的文本能够促使平壤放弃核试验，在“不设前提”的情况下重返六方会谈。

src: North Korea had earlier boycotted the talks in response to a sanction placed by the US on one of its banks, believed to linked to the regime of Kim Jong-Il.
ref: 作为对美国制裁其一家银行的反应，北朝鲜早些时候对会谈进行了抵制。据认为，被制裁的银行与金正日政权有关联。

src: North Korea claims it has nuclear weapons, although this has not yet been independently verified.
ref: 北朝鲜声称其拥有核武器，虽然这一点尚未得到独立验证。

src: PepsiCo Inc. is in line to get its first female chief executive before the end of the year.
ref: 百事公司有望在今年年底前迎来首位女性首席执行官。

src: Steven S. Reinemund, chairman and CEO of the U.S. soft drink and snack food giant, announced his retirement via press release effective in May, 2007.
ref: 史蒂芬·雷蒙德是美国软饮料和快餐食品巨头的董事长兼首席执行官，他于2007年5月通过新闻稿宣布退休。

src: Reinemund, 58, said he was leaving to spend more time with his family.
ref: 58岁的莱蒙德说，他离开这里是为了和家人有更多的时间呆在一起。

src: The same PepsiCo release confirmed that Indra Nooyi, currently president and CFO, will take over for Reinemund.
ref: 百事公司发布的同一份新闻稿证实，现任总裁兼首席财务官英德拉·卢英德将接替雷蒙德成为首席执行官。

src: The first is scheduled to be filled by Richard Goodman, 57, currently CFO of PepsiCo International, who will become CFO.
ref: 这一职位本计划由57岁的理查·古德曼填补。古德曼目前是百事国际的首席财务官，未来他将出任百事公司首席财务官。

src: Hugh Johnston, 44, currently senior vice president of transformation, was promoted to the newly created post of executive vice president of operations, procurement and information technology.
ref: 44岁的休·约翰斯顿是负责公司转型的高级副总裁，他被提升为了新设立的运营、采购和信息技术部门的执行副总裁。

src: Nooyi, 50, is a Yale-educated daughter of a middle class Indian family, according to her official biography.
ref: 据官方传记显示，50岁的卢英德，出生于一个印度中产阶级家庭，她毕业于耶鲁大学。

src: She is scheduled to succeed Reinemund, in October, the company said.
ref: 公司表示，她计划在10月份接替雷蒙德的工作。

src: Together, Nooyi and Reinemund have guided PepsiCo through several large take-overs and has seen the company overtake The Coca-Cola Company both in terms of sales and market value.
ref: 卢英德和雷蒙德一起带领百事可乐完成了几次大规模收购，在销售额和市场价值方面，百事可乐公司都超过了可口可乐公司。

src: Coca-Cola is still the No. 1 soft drink maker based on U.S. and global market share.
ref: 但基于美国和全球市场份额，可口可乐仍然是第一大软饮料制造商。

src: A significant portion of PepsiCo's sales revenue comes from non-drink brands in its Frito-Lay and Quaker Oats product lines.
ref: 百事公司销售收入的很大一部分来自非饮料品牌菲多利和桂格燕麦系列。

src: Some on Wall Street were surprised by Reinemund's retirement announcement, according to news reports.
ref: 据新闻报道，一些华尔街人士对雷蒙德的退休宣布感到惊讶。

src: Monday, the stock (ticker:PEP) closed up $0.62 at $63.95 per share on the NYSE.
ref: 周一，纽约证交所，百事公司股票收盘上涨0.62美元，涨至每股63.95美元。

src: A researcher at the University of Oxford has found a saucy poem attributed to John Milton, the 17th-century poet who wrote Paradise Lost and other religious verse.
ref: 牛津大学的一位研究人员发现了一首17世纪诗人约翰·弥尔顿写的不雅诗，他还写过“失乐园”和其他一些宗教诗歌。

src: "An Extempore Upon a Faggot", discovered in an 18th-century anthology of poetry, is not thought by modern scholars to be by Milton, however, and may in fact have been written by one of his rivals in an attempt to disgrace him.
ref: 然而，现代学者并不认为在18世纪的诗歌选集中发现的“关于柴的即兴表演”是弥尔顿的作品，而且事实上可能是他的一个竞争对手为了羞辱他而写的。

src: The poem was found by Dr Jennifer Batt, who said that it "is so out of tune with the rest of his work, that if the attribution is correct, it would prompt a major revision of our ideas about Milton."
ref: 这首诗是詹妮弗·巴特博士发现的，她说这首诗“与他的其他作品格格不入，如果这首诗的归属是正确的，它将促使我们重新修改对弥尔顿的观点。”

src: She discovered the rude verse in the Harding Collection of poetry anthologies held by the Bodleian Library, the main university library at Oxford.
ref: 她在牛津大学主要图书馆博德勒安图书馆藏有的“哈丁收藏集”的诗选中发现了这首粗俗的诗歌。

src: "To see the name of John Milton, the great religious and political polemicist, attached to such a bawdy epigram, is extremely surprising to say the least", she added.
ref: “看到约翰·弥尔顿，这位伟大的宗教和政治辩论家的名字，附在这样一首淫秽的诗句里，至少可以说是非常令人惊讶的，”她补充说。

src: The book in question, the Oxford and Cambridge Miscellany from 1708 (over 30 years after Milton's death), was described by another Oxford academic, Dr Abigail Williams, as "a set of poems written by witty young men about town for witty young men about town".
ref: 这本书是1708年（弥尔顿去世30多年后）出版的“牛津和剑桥杂文”，另一位牛津学者阿比盖尔·威廉姆斯博士称这是“诙谐的年轻人为镇里诙谐的年轻人写的关于城镇的诗集”。

src: Milton wrote in blank verse rather than using rhyme and used differing poetic rhythms, whereas the handwritten poem uses a simple pattern of rhyming couplets as it contrasts the sexual behaviour of young women and more experienced women by comparing them to green wood and dry wood upon a fire.
ref: 弥尔顿不是用韵律写诗，而是采用不同的诗歌节奏作诗。而这首手写诗使用了一种简单的押韵对联模式，因为它将年轻女性和更有经验的女性比作青木和火上的干柴，以对比她们的性行为。

src: Have you not in a Chimney seen
ref: 你没在烟囱里见过。

src: A Faggot which is moist and green
ref: 又湿又绿的木柴。

src: How coyly it receives the Heat
ref: 它是多么羞怯地接受热量。

src: And at both ends do's weep and sweat?
ref: 两边都流着眼泪和汗水吗？

src: So fares it with a tender Maid
ref: 将它和一个温柔的女仆一起燃烧。

src: When first upon her Back she's laid
ref: 第一次躺在她身上她是那么随和。

src: But like dry Wood th' experienced Dame
ref: 但像干柴一样有经验的女士。

src: Cracks and rejoices in the Flame
ref: 火焰中有裂痕和欢欣。

src: Milton (1608–1674) wrote many influential religious poems, including Paradise Lost, which is described by the Oxford Dictionary of National Biography as "widely and rightly regarded as the supreme poetic achievement in the English language, fit to sit alongside the poems of Homer, Virgil, and Dante."
ref: 弥尔顿（1608-1674）写了许多有影响力的宗教诗歌，包括“失乐园”，而“牛津国家传记词典”将其描述为“被公认为是英语语言中的最高诗歌成就，应与荷马、维吉尔和但丁的诗歌并驾齐驱。”

src: It tells the story of the fall from grace of Adam and Eve in an epic theological poem.
ref: 它以神学史诗的形式讲述了亚当和夏娃失落的故事。

src: He followed it with Paradise Regained, depicting the temptations of Jesus in the wilderness.
ref: 他紧随其后的作品是“重获天堂”，这首诗描绘了耶稣在旷野中的试探。

src: Bawdy poetry is not thought by modern academics to be in keeping with Milton's style, with Batt suggesting that it is likely that his name was added to the poem "to bring scandal upon [him], perhaps by a jealous contemporary."
ref: 现代学者认为淫秽的诗歌并不符合弥尔顿写作的风格，巴特暗示，写他的名字很可能是“为了给【他】带来丑闻，或许是由一个嫉妒他的同时代人”加进诗歌中的。

src: She suggests that the culprit might have been Sir John Suckling, a poet who was a supporter of the monarchy, in contrast to the Republican Milton.
ref: 她认为罪魁祸首可能是约翰·布克林爵士，他是支持君主制的诗人，与共和党的弥尔顿对立。

src: The University of Oxford is currently digitising the songbooks and anthologies of the Harding Collection, said to be the world's largest such collection, as part of a project to allow online access.
ref: 牛津大学目前正在数字化“哈丁收藏集”的歌曲和诗选，据说这是世界上最大的此类收藏集，项目的一部分允许在线访问。

src: It is named after Walter Harding, a British musician who collected music and poetry in Chicago.
ref: 收藏集是以沃尔特·哈丁的名字命名的，他是一位英国音乐家，在芝加哥收集音乐和诗歌。

src: The poem had been read before, but without anyone noticing Milton's name at the bottom.
ref: 这首诗以前有人读过，但没有人注意到末尾有弥尔顿的名字。

src: Dr Williams, the project's leader, expressed her doubts as to the authenticity of the attribution, commenting that "[y]ou could become very rich and famous – well, famous, anyway – if you could prove the rhyme was really by Milton."
ref: 威廉斯博士，该项目的负责人，表达了她对这首诗归属真实性的怀疑，并评论说，“如果你能证明这首韵律诗真的是弥尔顿写的，你可能会变得非常富有和出名--嗯，不管怎样--你会变得非常有名。”

src: Progress M-08M, an unmanned Russian cargo spacecraft, departed for the International Space Station (ISS) on Wednesday from the Baikonur Cosmodrome to resupply the orbital outpost.
ref: 周三，俄罗斯无人驾驶货运飞船进步M-08M号从拜科努尔航天发射场出发，前往国际空间站，为轨道前哨提供补给。

src: The rocket carrying the craft, a Soyuz-U, lifted off at 7:11 pm Moscow time (15:11 GMT).
ref: 搭载这艘飞船的联盟U型火箭于莫斯科时间晚上7点11分（格林尼治时间15：11）发射升空。

src: Russian Space Agency officials deemed the launch a success after the Progress successfully achieved orbit and separated from the third stage of the rocket.
ref: 俄罗斯航天局官员认为这次发射是成功的，因为“进步号”成功地进入了轨道，并脱离了火箭的第三级。

src: Docking of the spacecraft with the ISS is expected to occur on Saturday.
ref: 预计飞船与国际空间站的对接将在周六进行。

src: The Progress will deliver more than 2.5 metric tons of supplies and essentials to the orbiting American-Russian crew, as well as gifts and letters from the crew members' families.
ref: 进步号将向美俄轨道飞行的机组人员运送超过2.5吨的物资和必需品，以及来自机组成员家属的礼物和信件。

src: Former Major League Baseball pitcher and coach Pat Dobson died of leukemia Wednesday, November 22.
ref: 美国职业棒球大联盟前投手、教练帕特·多布森于11月22日星期三死于白血病。

src: He died at age 64 at a local San Diego hospital only a day after being diagnosed with the disease.
ref: 在他被诊断出患有这种疾病的一天后，他死在圣地亚哥当地一家医院，享年64岁。

src: Dobson is best known for winning 20 games in the 1971 season for the Baltimore Orioles.
ref: 1971年多布森为巴尔的摩金莺队赢得了20场比赛，因此出名。

src: Dobson finished his 11 year career with a career win-loss record of 122-129 and with a 3.54 ERA in eleven seasons.
ref: 多布森以122胜129负的战绩结束了他11年的职业生涯，并在11个赛季中取得了3.54的防御率。

src: Dobson later became a pitching coach for several teams, last appearing for the Orioles in 1996.
ref: 多布森后来成为几支球队的投手教练，他最后一次出现在金莺队是在1996年。

src: At his death he was a special assistant to San Francisco Giants general manager Brian Sabean, where he worked the past nine years.
ref: 在他去世时，他担任旧金山巨人公司总经理布莱恩·萨比安的一名特别助理，过去九年里他一直在那里工作。

src: The British Assets Recovery Agency is investigating £30 million / €44 million of assets believed to be owned by senior members of the Provisional Irish Republican Army (PIRA or IRA), using information provided by the Irish Criminal Assets Bureau and British and Irish law enforcement agencies.
ref: 英国资产追回机构正在利用爱尔兰犯罪资产局以及英国和爱尔兰执法机构提供的信息，对据信由爱尔兰临时共和军（PIRA或IRA）高级成员拥有的3000万英镑或4400万欧元的资产进行调查。

src: The money is believed to represent a small fraction of the wealth obtained by the organisation.
ref: 据称，这笔钱只占该组织获得的财富的一小部分。

src: Most of the assets are believed to have been owned by the IRA chief of staff, Thomas Murphy and businessman Dermot Craven.
ref: 据信，大部分资产由爱尔兰共和军参谋长托马斯·墨菲和商人德莫特·克雷文拥有。

src: Now that negotiations over weapons decommissioning are over, it is believed that other IRA members who have become rich through running protection rackets or other criminal activities may also be stripped of their illegal assests in the forthcoming weeks.
ref: 现在关于解除武器的谈判已经结束，据称，通过勒索保护费或进行其他犯罪活动致富的其他爱尔兰共和军成员也可能在今后的几周内被剥夺非法资产。

src: Businesses and organisations paying money towards protection rackets are hoping that the structure of the IRA will now begin to unravel.
ref: 支付保护费的企业和组织希望爱尔兰共和军的组织现在开始瓦解。

src: Please do not delete this page until flagged for speedy deletion by the user!
ref: 在用户将其标记为快速删除以前，请不要删除这个页面！

src: This is for a demonstration of English Wikinews' use of Flagged Revisions to various people working with the Foundation on the implementation for English Wikipedia.
ref: 这是为了向与《英语维基百科》实施基金会合作的各类人士演示如何使用英语维基新闻的“标记修订”功能而制作的。

src: On Friday, all six major American television networks; ABC, CBS, FOX, NBC, WB, and UPN, along with most PBS stations, united in a rare show of solidarity to air a one hour charity concert called Shelter from the Storm: A Concert for the Gulf Coast.
ref: 星期五，全部6家美国电视网络：ABC、CBS、FOX、NBC、WB和UPN，以及大多数PBS电台，罕见地联合举办了一场为时1个小时的慈善音乐会。音乐会被冠名为“避风港：湾区音乐会”。

src: The concert aired live at 8pm in the Eastern time zone and 7pm in the Central time zone and on tape-delay in the Mountain and Pacific time zones.
ref: 音乐会于东部时区上午8时中部时区下午7时播出，而在山区和太平洋时区则通过录音延时播放。

src: It was also shown on the Internet and many cable networks such as USA, Bravo and G4.
ref: 音乐会也通过互联网和许多有线网络播出，包括USA、Bravo和G4等。

src: The show was produced by Joel Gallen, the same man behind the September 11th tribute concert America: A Tribute to Heroes.
ref: 演出的制作人是乔尔·加伦。他也是9.11纪念音乐会“向英雄致敬”的制作人。

src: The show was not censored for political statements but was for obscenities.
ref: 这场演出遭到审查，不是因为政治原因，而是要审查是否存在淫秽内容。

src: Last week, rapper Kayne West made a remark on an NBC charity show A Concert for Hurricane Relief, in which West claimed that "George Bush doesn't care about black people.", which caused controversy.
ref: 上周，说唱歌手坎耶·维斯特对NBC慈善演出“飓风救援音乐会”发表评论。他说：“乔治·布什不关心黑人”。这一言论引起了争议。

src: Throughout the concert there were notable acts, such U2 performing "One" with Mary.
ref: 音乐会自始至终贯穿着引人注目的演出节目，比如U2乐队与玛丽一起演唱的“One”。

src: Another moment was Garth Brooks, Trisha Yearwood and the house band from The Late Show with David Letterman doing a cover of John Fogerty's "Who'll Stop The Rain".
ref: 另一个高潮是盖斯·布鲁克斯、特丽莎·耶尔伍德和演奏“深夜秀”的室内乐团的演出，大卫·莱特曼翻唱了约翰·弗基蒂的“谁能让雨停下来”。

src: Donations were being solicited for the American Red Cross and the Salvation Army.
ref: 在音乐会上为美国红十字会和救世军展开了募捐。

src: Telecom company AT&T provided toll-free calling and 10 call centers for the event and MCI provided volunteers from their call centers.
ref: 电信公司AT&T为活动提供了免费电话服务和10个呼叫中心。MCI的呼叫中心提供了自愿服务人员。

src: BET also held a charity concert called S.O.S (Saving OurSelves), a half-hour before cutting to the main one.
ref: 在音乐会开始前半个小时，BET也举办了一个名为“S.O.S（拯救自己）”的慈善音乐会，之后又切转到主场。

src: MTV, MTV Overdrive, VH1 and CMT will air a charity show Saturday called ReAct Now: Music & Relief.
ref: MTV、MTV超速挡、VH1和CMT将于星期日播出一台慈善演出。其名称是“立即行动：音乐与赈灾”。

src: The King of Jordan, King Abdullah, dissolved the country's parliament on Tuesday, half-way through its four year term, and called for early general elections to be held, up to two years ahead of schedule.
ref: 星期二，约旦国王阿卜杜拉解散了议会，议会只度过了约旦议会四年任期的一半，他还呼吁提前两年举行大选。

src: The monarch did not immediately provide a reason for the move; however, there have recently been reports accusing the parliament of handling legislation ineptly, and even of being corrupt.
ref: 国王并没有立即给出行动的理由；然而，最近有报道指责议会处理立法不当，甚至存在腐败问题。

src: The king's decree ordered the civil service to host new elections to replace the 110-member parliament, although an exact date for the polls hasn't yet been named.
ref: 国王的法令命令公务员举行新的选举，以替换由110名议员组成的议会，尽管投票的确切日期尚未确定。

src: Critics of the parliament have said that its members didn't properly address issues such as unemployment and poverty.
ref: 批评议会的人士说，议会成员没有恰当地处理失业和贫困等问题。

src: The opposition, however, asserted that the house had been disbanded so that the government could use emergency laws to pass legislation.
ref: 然而，反对派声称，该议会已经被解散，以便政府能够利用紧急状态法通过立法。

src: King Abdullah has now disbanded the parliament two times since he came to power in 1999.
ref: 阿卜杜拉国王自1999年上台以来，已两次解散议会。

src: The Nine Network has announced the death of one of Australia's richest men, Kerry Packer, aged 68.
ref: 据第九电视网报道，澳大利亚最富有的人之一，凯瑞·帕克逝世，享年68岁。

src: Announcer Richard Wilkins said on the Today Show that he had just been handed official confirmation of Mr Packer's death at 68.
ref: 播音员理查德·威尔金斯在“今日秀”上说，他刚刚得到官方证实，帕克去世，享年68岁。

src: He said a statement from Tony Ritchie, Nine head of news, said: "Mrs Kerry Packer and her children James and Gretel sadly report the passing last evening of her husband and their father Kerry."
ref: 他说，第九电视网头条新闻的托尼·里奇在一份声明中表示：“克里·帕克和她的孩子詹姆斯和格雷特悲伤地宣布了她丈夫和他们父亲凯瑞昨晚去世的消息。”

src: "He died peacefully at home with his family at his bedside".
ref: “他在家中安详地死去，当时他的家人都在他的床边”。

src: Packer was the major shareholder in Publishing and Broadcasting Limited (PBL) which owns the Nine television network and Australian Consolidated Press, the producer of many Australian and New Zealand magazines.
ref: 帕克是出版和广播有限公司（PBL）的主要股东，该公司旗下拥有第九电视网和澳大利亚联合出版社，后者是许多澳大利亚和新西兰杂志的制作社。

src: Packer was also involved in the gambling and tourism industries and owned the Crown Casino in Melbourne.
ref: 帕克还涉及赌博业和旅游业，并在墨尔本拥有皇冠赌场。

src: In the 1970s, his World Series Cricket revolutionised cricket, bringing One-day cricket to the fore by introducing things such as coloured uniforms, white balls & day/night matches.
ref: 20世纪70年代，他的世界板球系列赛节目彻底改变了板球运动，该节目通过引入彩色制服、白色球和昼夜比赛等方式，将一天制板球推上了潮流。

src: Business Review Weekly magazine estimated Packer's net worth at AU$6.5 billion in 2004.
ref: 《商业评论周刊》估计，2004年帕克的净资产为65亿澳元。

src: Another famous rich Australian media magnate, who may have lost his Australian nationality, is Rupert Murdoch.
ref: 另一位著名的澳大利亚富媒体大亨鲁珀特·默多克可能已经失去了澳大利亚国籍。

src: US lawmakers have reached a last-minute deal to avoid a government shutdown, which would have begun at 12:00 EDT (04:00 UTC) Saturday.
ref: 为避免政府停摆，美国国会议员在最后一刻达成了一项协议，该协议本应在美国东部时间周六12：00（世界协调时04：00）开始。

src: The agreement, announced just one hour before the shutdown was to occur, includes US$38.5 billion in budget reductions.
ref: 这项协议是在政府停摆前一小时宣布的，其中包括385亿美元的预算削减。

src: Earlier on Friday, US legislators deflected claims that a midnight deal was being worked out, but Republican Party sources later reported that a deal was likely to be reached.
ref: 周五早些时候，美国立法者否认了一项午夜协议正在制定中的说法，但共和党消息人士后来报告称，协议可能会达成。

src: The deal was apparently reached after disputes over government funding for organizations such as Planned Parenthood were resolved.
ref: 这项协议显然是，在政府为计划生育等组织提供资金的争端得到解决后达成的。

src: Boehner said both sides decided on a six-day extension, or "bridge," of government funding, which would allow Congress to work out a final solution to last the remainder of the 2011 fiscal year, which ends in September.
ref: 博纳说，双方决定将政府资金的期限延长六天，或者说是构造一个“桥梁”，这将使国会有机会找到一项最终解决方案，能够维持过2011年财政年度的剩余时间（即9月结束）。

src: Voting for the resulting agreement will take place some time next week, according to Boehner.
ref: 博纳说，最终达成的协议将于下周某个时候投票通过。

src: The last complete US government shutdown occurred in 1995, during the administration of Bill Clinton, lasting five days; it was proceeded by a 21-day partial shutdown.
ref: 上一次美国政府全面停摆发生在1995年比尔·克林顿执政期间，停摆历时5天，21天部分停摆。

src: In the event of a government shutdown, essential federal employees are still required to work, but nonessential personnel are placed on unpaid furloughs.
ref: 在政府停摆的情况下，基层的联邦雇员仍然需要工作，但非必要的人员会被安排无薪休假。

src: Essential staff include military personnel, air traffic controllers, emergency officials, and intelligence officials.
ref: 基层工作人员包括军事人员、空中交通管制员、应急人员和情报官员。

src: Republican candidates for President of the United States Newt Gingrich and Rick Perry have failed to qualify to be on the ballot for the Virginia primary election, scheduled for March 6, Super Tuesday.
ref: 美国共和党总统候选人纽特·金里奇和里克·佩里没有获得定于3月6日超级星期二的弗吉尼亚州初选的参选权。

src: Gingrich, former Speaker of the United States House of Representatives and Perry, Governor of Texas, did not submit the 10,000 signatures, with at least 400 from each of the state's eleven congressional districts, to the state's board of elections before the 5:00 PM deadline last Thursday required to gain ballot access, according to the Republican Party of Virginia.
ref: 据弗吉尼亚州共和党称，美国前众议院议长金里奇和德克萨斯州州长佩里没有在上周四下午5点的最后期限之前，向该州选举委员会提交1万个签名，其中，该州11个国会选区中的每个选区都至少要有400个签名。

src: Gingrich's and Perry's campaigns both claimed to have more signatures than needed, 11,050 and 11,911 respectively.
ref: 金里奇和佩里的竞选团队都声称拥有足够的签名，分别为11,050个和11,911个。

src: Volunteers spent last night reviewing the submitted petitions and validating signatures.
ref: 志愿者们昨晚审查了提交的请愿书并确认了签名。

src: Reportedly Rick Perry is considering an appeal of the assessment.
ref: 据报道，里克·佩里正在考虑对这一评估提出上诉。

src: Among other major candidates for the 2012 Republican presidential nomination, former Governor of Massachusetts Mitt Romney and Texas congressman Ron Paul submitted the required petition and qualified for the ballot.
ref: 在2012年共和党总统候选人提名的其他主要候选人中，马萨诸塞州前州长米特·罗姆尼和德克萨斯州众议员罗恩·保罗提交了所需的请愿书，并获得参选权。

src: On Thursday, it was disclosed that candidates Michele Bachmann and Rick Santorum also failed to gain ballot access.
ref: 周四，候选人米歇尔·巴赫曼和里克·桑托勒姆也被透露没有获得参选权。

src: According to the manager of the Gingrich campaign, Michael Krull, the former House Speaker plans to compete in the Virginia primary, despite not gaining ballot access, as a write-in candidate.
ref: 据金里奇竞选团队的经理迈克尔·克鲁尔说，尽管没有获得参选权，但这位前众议院议长计划作为一名自填候选人参加弗吉尼亚州初选。

src: Krull blamed a "failed system" for the campaign's inability to gain ballot access.
ref: 克鲁尔将竞选团队没能获得参选权归咎于一个“无效的体制”。

src: Rick Perry's campaign manager said he was disappointed by that campaign's failure to qualify for the ballot.
ref: 里克·佩里的竞选经理表示，他对该竞选团队未能获得参选权感到失望。

src: According to a recent poll of 489 Republican voters by Quinnipiac University, Gingrich leads in the state with 30% of support, followed by Mitt Romney at 25% and Ron Paul at 9%.
ref: 昆尼皮亚克大学对489名共和党选民进行的一项最近调查显示，金里奇以百分之三十的支持率在该州领先，其次是支持率为百分之二十五的米特·罗姆尼和支持率为百分之九的罗恩·保罗。

src: As Virginia's delegates to the Republican National Convention are not awarded on a winner-take-all basis, candidates other than the winner of the state's primary could also gain delegates from the state.
ref: 由于弗吉尼亚州参加共和党全国代表大会的代表不是在赢者通吃的基础上被授予的，因此除了该州初选的获胜者之外，其他候选人也可以从该州获得代表。
